title: ardisia retusa
intro: Ardisia retusa, also known as the "False Corallodendron," is a type of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ardisia retusa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
